title: Viidaav
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:Viidaav.jpg]] |name=Viidaav |region=*[[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[The Slice/Legends|The Slice]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' and its [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] define [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] as the portion of the galaxy between and including the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]] and [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]]. |sector=[[Bryx sector/Legends|Bryx sector]] |system=[[Viidaav system/Legends|Viidaav system]] |coordinates=R-7 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons=At least 2{{CWACite|5|Heroes on Both Sides (comic story)}} |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate=[[Temperature/Legends|Arid]]{{CSWECite|III|306|Viidaav}} |gravity= |terrain=*Rocky [[Desert/Legends|deserts]] *[[Mountain/Legends|Mountains]] |water= |interest=[[Separatist command center (Viidaav)|Separatist command center]] |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species=[[Viidaav (species)|Viidaav]] |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population=At least 200,000 |demonym= |cities=A [[Unidentified Viidaav colony|colony]] |imports= |exports=[[Starship/Legends|Starships]] |affiliation=[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] }} {{Quote|Commander, the Viidaav won't be able to evacuate in time, either. They're killing themselves—and their own planet.''"
"''It's more likely their Separatist 'allies' triggered it. Probably using the colony's own mining charges, buried in the crust.|A clone trooper and a clone commander|}} '''Viidaav''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Bryx sector/Legends|Bryx sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. It was inhabited by the [[Viidaav (species)|Viidaav species]]. ==History== {{Quote|The ''Viidaav'' colony is all but lost—as you requested.''"
"''Has the Republic landed most of their troops?''"
"''Enough to set the trap.|Grievous and Dooku|}} Viidaav was the site of a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] base during the early stages of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], until it was found by [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Scout/Legends|scouts]]. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 5|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume'' 5]] dates its stories, including "[[Heroes on Both Sides (comic story)|Heroes on Both Sides]]," to just before and during the events of [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] and [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] [[Battle of Viidaav|allowed]] the Republic to land their [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] on Viidaav in order to spring a trap. {{Planet-stub}} ==Appearances== *{{CWACite|5|Heroes on Both Sides (comic story)}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |nl=Viidaav }} [[Category:Bryx sector locations]] [[Category:Confederacy of Independent Systems planets]] [[Category:Desert planets]] [[Category:Planets in the Mid Rim]] [[Category:Planets in the Slice]] [[Category:Rocky planets]]
